generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance HeatBedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Planar heat‑bed providing ≤100 W heating, powered via MOSFET switch, controlled through GPIO optocoupler interface"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12 V/24 V DC fan circulating air (≈0.02 m³ s⁻¹ full turnover ≈2 s), driven by MOSFET switch with optocoupler isolation"
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance InternalTempDataStreamA : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensorA
]

instance InternalTempDataStreamB : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensorB
]

instance AmbientTempDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTempSensor
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance InternalTempSensorA : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1‑Wire digital thermometer (‑55 °C → +125 °C, 0.5 °C accuracy) located inside the incubator",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempDataStreamA
]

instance InternalTempSensorB : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1‑Wire digital thermometer (‑55 °C → +125 °C, 0.5 °C accuracy) located inside the incubator",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempDataStreamB
]

instance AmbientTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1‑Wire digital thermometer (‑55 °C → +125 °C, 0.5 °C accuracy) measuring room temperature",
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTempDataStream
]

// C11: Enablers
instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python3 RabbitMQ message broker running on the Raspberry Pi, receives temperature DataTransmitted streams",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService,
                 TemperatureMonitoringService,
                 SafetyCheckService,
                 PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance CalibrationOptimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SciPy non‑linear least‑squares optimiser (Python3) used to calibrate ModelA and ModelB parameters",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance MonitoringEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring module in the low‑level driver that evaluates incoming temperature data against set‑points",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureMonitoringService
]

instance SafetyProtocolEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Safety protocol implemented in the low‑level driver checks temperature limits before actuator commands",
    DTDFVocab:enables SafetyCheckService
]

instance PredictiveSimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python simulation engine that uses calibrated thermal models to forecast temperature trajectories",
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

// C10: Data (temperature readings)
instance InternalTempDataA : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped temperature reading from InternalTempSensorA",
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempDataStreamA,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker
]

instance InternalTempDataB : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped temperature reading from InternalTempSensorB",
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempDataStreamB,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker
]

instance AmbientTempData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped temperature reading from AmbientTempSensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTempDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker
]

// C6: Services
instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that calibrates thermal model parameters (C_air, G_box, C_heater, G_heater) using experimental temperature data",
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationInsight,
                 UpdateModelParametersAction
]

instance TemperatureMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that continuously monitors temperature readings, detects deviations from set‑points and triggers control actions",
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationAlertInsight,
                 AdjustHeatingAction,
                 AdjustFanAction,
                 OperatorAlertAction
]

instance SafetyCheckService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that applies safety checks on temperature data and actuator commands according to the low‑level driver protocol",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight,
                 SafetyShutdownAction
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs predictive simulations of thermal behaviour for set‑point tracking and provides forecasts",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedTemperatureInsight,
                 RecommendSetPointAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance CalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibration yields updated thermal parameters (e.g., C_air, G_box) which are logged for traceability"
]

instance DeviationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring detects deviation from target temperature set‑points"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety protocol identifies temperature excursions beyond safe operating bounds"
]

instance PredictedTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation provides forecasted temperature trajectory for the upcoming control horizon"
]

// C17: Actions
instance AdjustHeatingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Controller adjusts heat‑bed power to drive temperature toward the set‑point",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Controller changes fan speed to improve air mixing and temperature uniformity",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperatorAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "System sends an alert to the operator with recommended corrective action",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance UpdateModelParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimiser updates model parameters and stores calibrated ModelA and ModelB definitions",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SafetyShutdownAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic shutdown of heat‑bed and fan when safety limits are breached",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RecommendSetPointAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Provides operator with recommended temperature set‑point adjustments based on forecast",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C10: Models
instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Single‑node thermal model with air heat capacity C_air and box conductance G_box",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationOptimizer,
                 PredictiveSimulationEngine
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Extended thermal model adding heat‑bed temperature, heat capacity C_heater and conductance G_heater",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationOptimizer,
                 PredictiveSimulationEngine
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (heat‑bed ON/OFF, fan ON/OFF, heating duration, waiting duration) are sent from the DT to the Raspberry Pi via RabbitMQ; the controller extracts the commands and toggles the MOSFET drivers to actuate the heat‑bed and fan."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture consists of the Physical Twin (incubator hardware), a low‑level driver layer, a RabbitMQ communication server, a controller module (bang‑bang with wait), and DT components (calibration algorithm, monitor, simulator) that subscribe/publish to RabbitMQ, forming a closed loop between PT and virtual models."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the design stage (development of thermal models Model A and Model B), the manufacturing/implementation stage (hardware assembly and software deployment), and the operation stage (continuous monitoring, calibration against experimental data, and run‑time prediction)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity relies on four assumptions (uniform temperature, negligible wall heat storage, constant air specific heat, negligible fan heat). Calibration minimizes residual error using least‑squares; validation is performed with uniform‑temperature experiments (temperature spread ≤7 °C, reduced to ≤6 °C with higher fan voltage). Model B captures heat‑bed inertia, improving predictive accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Data exchange uses the AMQP protocol of RabbitMQ over the Raspberry Pi’s built‑in Wi‑Fi/Bluetooth network; sensor data are sent as messages, and control commands are received via the same broker. The 1‑Wire bus provides sensor connectivity to the Pi GPIO."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and all DT services are deployed locally on the Raspberry Pi 4 (on‑premises). The Pi’s Wi‑Fi enables remote monitoring if required; the open‑source repository provides the full software stack for replication."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The low‑level driver incorporates a safe protocol that forces the hardware into a known safe state on communication errors; the controller includes safety limits (lower/upper temperature bounds) and a waiting period to avoid overshoot, ensuring safe operation of the incubator."
]
